---
title: "manual_learn.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\harness\manual_learn.py"
loc: 44
complexity: 8
logic_score: 2.47
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.38
---

## Intent
The `manual_learn.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on run_learning_cycle. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_learning_cycle. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [colorama](file://colorama)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [tests.harness.raven_proxy](file://tests.harness.raven_proxy)
- [traceback](file://traceback)

### Exports
- `run_learning_cycle`
